name: California Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Fish Stock (or half water and half bottled clam juice)
1/4 Cup Chopped Fresh Fennel (or 1/2 tsp Crushed Fennel Seeds)
1 Pound Red Snapper; cut into chunks
1 Pound Halibut or Sea Bass; cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot.
2. Add garlic, onion, leeks, and bay leaf. Cook until the onion is tender but not browned.
3. Add tomatoes, fish stock, white wine, fennel, saffron, salt, pepper, and parsley. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for about 5 minutes.
5. Add lobster, snapper, and halibut. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Rinse shrimp and crab, and scrub clams, oysters, and mussels clean.
7. Add the shellfish to the pot. Cook until shells open, about 5 minutes.
8. Serve in large soup plates with crusty bread, if desired.
Makes 6 to 8 servings
